title: Auction of State Government Securities
description: The following State Governments have offered to sell stock by way of auction, for an aggregate amount of ₹39,541 Crore (Face Value). Sr. No. State Amount to be raised (₹ Crore) Additional Borrowing (Greenshoe) Option (₹ Crore) Tenor (Year) Type of Auction 1. Assam 500 - 10 Yield 2. Gujarat 1000 500 09 Yield 3. Haryana 1000 - 05 Yield 1500 - 15 Yield 1500 - 18 Yield 4. Kerala 1000 - 15 Yield 750 - 20 Yield 5. Madhya Pradesh 1500 - 14 Yield 1000 - 24 Yield 6. Nagaland 350 - 15 Yi
